diagrams.title: Virtual Machine Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of virtual machines with hypervisor between hardware and guest operating systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how VMs abstract physical resources and how hypervisor manages allocation

diagrams.title: Type-1 vs Type-2 Hypervisor Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of bare-metal and hosted hypervisor architectures
elements: Type-2: Hardware -> Host OS -> Hypervisor -> VMs
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between hypervisor types and their appropriate use cases

diagrams.title: Live Migration Process
diagrams.description: Illustrates the step-by-step process of moving a running VM between physical hosts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how VM migration works with minimal service interruption
